utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage, (2) property_coverage, (3) travel_coverage, (4) additional_services, and (5) total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these items. Each one is fully specified with coverage details and corresponding costs (monthly and annual), plus notes that provide additional detail. Therefore, all 5 out of 5 required items are present and complete.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four main components: LifeFirst Standard8 for health coverage, property coverage with no specific brand but most closely matching LifeFirst Standard Coverage, travel coverage that aligns with LifeFirst Standard Plan, and additional services (accident, legal, income protection) which do not directly correspond to rated items but can be omitted since no ratings exist. For health_coverage, 'LifeFirst Standard8' is clearly an extension of 'LifeFirst Standard Plan', which has separate ratings for physical health (9) and mental health (4). For property_coverage, the closest match is 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection/home_content with rating 9. For travel_coverage, the match is 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage/travel_insurance with rating 9. There is no direct mapping for 'additional_services' because those items (accident, legal, income protection) are not individually rated in the ground-truth data.
